wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.canRestore: You can restore your existing wallet

walletSettings.backupDesc: Manage your wallet backup to ensure you can always recover your funds
walletSettings.backedUp: Your wallet is backed up to Nostr relays
walletSettings.notBackedUp: Your wallet is not backed up. We recommend backing up to relays or downloading a backup file.
walletSettings.lightningDesc: Your Lightning address lets others send you payments easily
walletSettings.shareAddress: Share this address with anyone who wants to pay you via Lightning.
walletSettings.profileSynced: This address is set in your Nostr profile
walletSettings.noProfileAddress: No lightning address in your Nostr profile yet
walletSettings.profileAddressNote: This address is set in your Nostr profile. You can optionally register a Lightning address for this wallet.
walletSettings.noAddressYet: You don't have a Lightning address yet. Set one up to receive payments easily.
walletSettings.sparkAddressDesc: Your unique Spark protocol address for receiving instant payments
walletSettings.dangerZoneDesc: Irreversible actions that affect your wallet
walletSettings.removeWalletNote: This will remove the wallet from this device. You can restore it later using your recovery phrase.
walletSettings.recoveryPhraseDesc: Write down these 12 words in order and store them safely. Anyone with these words can access your funds.
walletSettings.neverShare: Never share your recovery phrase. Never enter it on any website.
walletSettings.revealWords: Click below to reveal your recovery phrase
walletSettings.copyPhraseWarning: Your recovery phrase will be copied to the clipboard. This is sensitive information that gives full access to your wallet.
walletSettings.copyPhraseSecurity: For security, the clipboard will be automatically cleared after 30 seconds.
walletSettings.copyPhraseNeverShare: Never share this phrase with anyone or paste it into untrusted applications.
walletSettings.enterRecoveryDesc: Your recovery phrase could not be retrieved automatically. Please enter your 12-word recovery phrase to {{action}}.
walletSettings.deleteBackupDesc: This will remove your encrypted backup from Nostr relays. Make sure you have another backup before doing this.
walletSettings.removeWalletWarning: This will remove the wallet from this device. You will need your 12-word recovery phrase to restore it.
walletSettings.removeWalletPermanent: If you haven't backed up your recovery phrase, you will lose access to your funds permanently.
walletSettings.setupAddressDesc: Choose a username for your Lightning address. This lets others easily send you payments.
walletSettings.usernameTaken: This username is already taken. Please try another.
walletSettings.removeAddressDesc: This will remove your Lightning address. You can always set up a new one later, but the same username may not be available.
walletSettings.addToProfileDesc: Would you like to add your new Lightning address to your Nostr profile? This will allow others to send you zaps and payments.
walletSettings.recoveryPhraseNotFoundDesc: Could not retrieve your recovery phrase from storage. You may need to restore your wallet.
walletSettings.clipboardClearedDesc: Recovery phrase removed from clipboard for security.
walletSettings.profileUpdatedDesc: Your Lightning address has been added to your Nostr profile.
walletSettings.updateFailedDesc: Failed to update your profile. You can add the address manually in Settings.

wallet2.selfCustodialDesc: You control your keys. No one else can access your funds.
wallet2.outdatedBrowser: Outdated browser: Update to the latest version of your browser
wallet2.privacyExtensions: Privacy extensions: Some privacy tools disable WebAssembly
wallet2.chromeEtc: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, or Edge (latest versions)
wallet2.lockdownMode: Make sure Lockdown Mode is disabled (iOS/macOS)

auth.joinMovement: Join the movement and share your story
auth.saveKeyWarning: Save your secret key! You'll need it to access your account.
auth.keyGenerated: Your secret key has been generated
auth.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Log in
auth.keyWarningMessage: This key is your primary and only means of accessing your account. Store it safely and securely. Please download your key to continue.
auth.openSignerPrompt: Open your signer app to connect
auth.sessionNotDetectedDesc: The login session was not found. This can happen if:
auth.signerNotComplete: The signer app did not complete authorization
auth.differentBrowser: You opened this page in a different browser

forms.searchPlaceholder: Search by display name, npub, or pubkey...
forms.pasteInvoice: Paste Lightning invoice, Lightning address, Bitcoin address, or LNURL...
forms.pollQuestion: What would you like to ask the community?
